name: saver
description: Saver - Smart shopping assistant for product search and price comparison (省心买 - 智能购物助手，支持京东/淘宝商品搜索和比价推荐)

tools.name: complete_shopping
tools.description: Complete shopping flow - auto analyze, search, compare, and recommend (完整购物流程 - 自动分析需求、搜索、比价、生成推荐)

tools.name: analyze_shopping_need
tools.description: Analyze shopping needs and determine if more information is needed (分析用户购物需求，判断是否需要确认更多信息)

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search products from JD/Taobao and return product list (搜索商品（京东/淘宝），返回商品列表)
